title: Kein Land für Niemand - Abschottung eines Einwanderungslandes
original_title: Kein Land für Niemand - Abschottung eines Einwanderungslandes
overview: Germany stands at a historic turning point: for the first time since 1945, in 2025 a migration policy resolution is passed in the Bundestag — with the support of far-right forces in parliament. A paradigm shift is underway: away from protecting refugees, toward isolation and deterrence.
